message:
fix: resolve 12 clippy warnings (vec_init_then_push, map_or, closures)

- Use vec![] macro instead of sequential push calls in config generation
- Rename to_box_chars to box_chars (wrong_self_convention on Copy type)
- Replace map_or with map_or_else to avoid eager default evaluation
- Replace redundant closures with method references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
